articles.title: Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (May 20)
articles.description:
ABINGTON 337 Randolph St. One-family Colonial, built in 1966, 2,520 square feet, 10 rooms, 5 bedrooms, 4 baths, on 25,246-square-foot lot. $784,900 34 Park Ave. One-family Cape Cod, built in 1960, 1,912 square feet, 7 rooms, 3 bedrooms, 3 baths, on 26,117-square-foot lot. $732,000 120 Temple St. One-family conventional, built in 1890, 1,305 square feet, […]

The post Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (May 20) appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Abington home sales include a Colonial at 337 Randolph St. for $784,900.
34 Park Ave. sold for $732,000, featuring 3 bedrooms and 3 baths.
Rising home prices may affect affordability for Boston residents seeking new homes.
